transcript.clean_text: the penultimate day of lava and an enormous climbing test ahead of everyone a sense of Last Chance Saloon for those who are not sprinters they would have their fun of course in Madrid but this was about mountains and lots of them 10 climbs in total guaranteed to have a breakway who would be up the road well you could probably guess some of the names but how big would the group be and indeed what sort of margin would they be allowed it all depends of course on who was up front except c a man well worthy of protecting as yumbo visma have finally worked out AO starting off as the best young Rider still the best Spanish Rider up for grabs and this the course a series of Loops many climes to be repeated but indeed a day like no other we expect high mountains on the penultimate day in terms of altitude not so tough but 10 categorized climes and 20 climbs along the way in total this was going to draw a response and boy did we get one right at the very beginning finally we established a breakaway of 32 Riders including Remco even aole not looking for mountains points he owned the king of the mountains Jersey and they were relaying very nicely and the Gap start started to swell getting up to well over 6 minutes for much of the day and getting even more profound later on nudging up towards the 10minute mark well the quality of those who were up front was there to see but it surely couldn't stay as a cohesive group and how did they deny Remco aapo who's been so strong in a situation like this throughout the race well that was the question that some were trying to answer the cohesion started to break down around 70 km to go and the attacks carried on raining down but aaple along with katano James Knox and Bak were more than capable of staving off the problem well that was until the very final climb of the day wal Po's attacked a aole could not respond and a gap suddenly opened up this was enormous well also up front riding brilliant with Van eatel Mark cair bridged over as well coming along for the ride was paleo Sanchez from Bergos BH and every nul looked to be in trouble we came up to the final climb it was a gnarly nasty one then a downhill run on uneven surfaces aaple super Arrow caught the group that were still powering away and indeed sailed by them 80 km an hour and more he was absolutely back where he wanted to be up front but who from this quintet were going to win meanwhile over 10 minutes down there was a little Skirmish going on amongst the Spanish Riders but calm ensued and indeed sep crus just heading for virtual victory in this race we came under the flam Rouge there was only a modest margin on a chasing group others from the Breakaway but the winner was going to come from these five and W PS went for it up the inside it was a clever move and with 300 M to go he was absolutely in charge it was an enormous distance that Aon aul had to charge into surely that was the only man who could deny W Poes who came up over the rise powered down towards the line had it been perfect timing that was the big question it was all going to be on the throw could evap pole get back at him Po's desperate to add to a tour to France Victory and got there not to be for rco aaple who has already taken of course a hatful of stages in this race but wal Poes gets one and a more popular winner you'll be hard pushed to find a the ball trying to figure out just how he let that slip from his grasp but you know three- stage wins for the great man is something very special this the moment that Po's decided to attack and just look at the margin that he opened up on those behind him perfect timing and perfect delivery at the end well PA's the day winner but coming up behind was of course SE here's how they stacked up aaple Sanchez vanv Solair Costa Tiber camna B and Rubio all beaten by or poles in the end but the big winner for the race is of course seus his super domestics they won't mind us calling them that this time by Primos rogich and yonis Bing AO just sitting either side of him and so was thanking them royally for everything they have done for him a worthy Champion the American he'll be crown of course in Madrid and the hugs have already started lots of them I can tell you sepkus has won this Welter a sprinter's day tomorrow then he will be crowned but he knows he has already achieved the task an amazing one it has a stage win and a magnificent time trial and a winning margin in L Welter of 17 seconds over yis finger go and Primus rogl the tour and Ziro Champions themselves every one of this year's grand Tours has gone to yumbo visma with a different Rider never been done before and so Madrid beckons stage 21 just 101 km you understand finishing in a nocturn nine laps of the Great including a bonus Sprint along the way it should be one for the sprinters of course but you'll have to tune in to find out and of course for the coronation of the great sep cus King cus the first
